basic_details.job_title: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 39 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website esic.gov.in. A total of 39 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB or Super-specialty (MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB) as per NMC guidelines
qualification.details: Anesthesiology with Surgical Super Specialty: In accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI). In case of non-availability of Super-specialty Senior Residents (MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB) for Super-specialty Departments, the Senior Residents from the concerned parent Broad Specialties will be considered. content_sections.heading: ESIC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Senior Resident posts is scheduled for 16 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident post at ESIC?
faq.answer: There are a total of 39 vacancies for the Senior Resident post announced by ESIC through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the ESIC Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with MD/MS/DNB or a Super-specialty (MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB) as per the latest NMC guidelines to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Resident post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,48,669/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand.

faq.question: Q7. Which departments have vacancies for Senior Residents?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in departments such as Anesthesiology, Cardiology, Cardiothoracic Surgery, Critical Care Medicine, Radiology, Endocrinology, Gastroenterology, Oncology, Neonatology, Nephrology, Neurology, and Neurosurgery.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for ESIC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Faridabad, Haryana. The exact venue details can be found in the official notification.
